success_criteria.description: Every precinct is assigned to a district, and all three districts are in use.
All three districts have roughly equal population (within 10%).

character.name: You
character.motivation: The tri-county commission needs three State House districts for the upcoming election. Equal population, contiguous boundaries — by Friday.

intro_slides.heading: Three Counties. Three Districts.
intro_slides.body:
North County, Central County, and South County are being redrawn into three State House districts.

The challenge: population is unevenly distributed. You'll need to split counties to balance the numbers.

intro_slides.heading: The rules are simple
intro_slides.body:
Each district must be contiguous — no islands. Population must be within 10% of equal. Party politics? Not your problem.

Draw the lines.

narrative.objective: Divide the Millbrook Tri-County Area into 3 contiguous districts with roughly equal population.
